# currentProtocol

**Instance Property**

The protocol used for communication with the Smart Card. Returns [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardProtocol/TKSmartCardProtocolNone] if no session is currently established.

## Declaration

```swift
var currentProtocol: TKSmartCardProtocol { get }
```

## Setting the Communication Protocol

- **allowedProtocols**: The protocols allowed for communication with the Smart Card. [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardProtocol/any] by default.
- **TKSmartCardProtocol**: Smart Card transmission protocols.
